positive: A vibrant cyberpunk cityscape scene at night, viewed from a rainy street level. Neon signs reflecting off wet pavement, flying vehicles, and towering, rain-slicked mega-structures. Cinematic lighting, deep contrast, synthwave aesthetic, hyper-detailed digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sepia, pastel colors
